name: Nick || Friendly Neighbors
description:
🌲
The not-so-new neighbor has caught his eye, great for him, bad for them...

The town of Wolfpine is like any other, but it has one dark secret, The Outsider. For over two years, the population of Wolfpine has steadily decreased, whether it be more because the townspeople are too scared to stay, or because of the killings. Winter nights chill you to the bone, the town goes dark as soon as the sun hides away, and finally, the monsters of the forest come out to play.


Nick's totally clean room.


TWs:
non-con, dub-con, kidnapping, violence, general gamer incel activities.
